title: PaymentSchedule
description: An ordered, dated set of PROPOSED payment steps produced by the Payment Sequencer (Module 5, FR-PAY-002/003) and recorded on user acceptance. FinOS MOVES NO MONEY: each step is a proposal/record the user executes externally and that Bills reflects in the bill calendar (Constitution IV, FR-X-003). The ordering avoids overdrafts (no intermediate projected balance breaches the safety buffer) and maximizes goal progress within that constraint. Acceptance records are IDEMPOTENT, keyed on source_event_id (Constitution IV; platform-decisions §4). All money fields are integer minor units (cents). Provided to Bills, Cash Safety, Shopping, and Tasks.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; cross-profile acceptance is authZ-checked server-side on session identity, never on this client-supplied value (threat model).

source_event_id.description: Idempotency key for the acceptance/publication. A replayed acceptance with the same source_event_id MUST NOT double-record steps or re-publish (UNIQUE constraint; Constitution IV).

period_start.description: Sequencing period start (typically the user's statement/calendar month).

feasibility.description: feasible = an overdraft-free ordering exists and is in steps. infeasible = no overdraft-free ordering exists; steps holds the best attainable order, shortfall is populated, and deferral_recommendations is non-empty (FR-PAY-002). An infeasible result is NEVER presented as feasible (SC-P-004).

projected_lowest_balance.description: Lowest projected balance over the period under this ordering, integer cents. For a feasible schedule this is at or above the safety buffer (carries the basis that produced it, Constitution VI).

shortfall.description: Populated iff feasibility = infeasible: the projected breach the user cannot avoid by reordering.

shortfall_on.description: Date the projected balance first breaches the safety buffer.

shortfall_amount.description: Amount by which the projection falls short of the buffer at the breach, integer cents.

goal_progress_delta.description: Net CAD advanced toward goals by this ordering versus the naive due-date-only order, integer cents (summed in integer cents; never float).

steps.description: Ordered payment steps. Order is significant — earlier index = earlier in the sequence. Empty only when no obligations exist for the period.

obligation_ref.description: The obligation this step pays. Sourced from BillCalendar when present, else a user-entered obligation.

kind.description: goal_contribution = a discretionary contribution advanced for goal progress.

source.description: Provenance of the obligation; user_entered when Bills is not yet connected.

source_account_id.description: AccountState account_id funds are proposed to come from. FinOS does not move them — the user executes externally.

scheduled_date.description: Proposed execution date (UTC date; rendered to the user's locale at the edge).

projected_balance_after.description: Projected balance immediately after this step, integer cents. For a feasible schedule, MUST be at or above the safety buffer (SC-P-004).

goal_progress_contribution.description: CAD advanced toward a goal by this step, integer cents; zero for a non-goal step (FR-X-004 time-to-goal context).

goal_ref.description: GoalState goal_id this step advances; null when the step is not goal-affecting.

status.description: proposed = not yet accepted; accepted = recorded idempotently on the source_event_id; needs_resequence = a later spine refresh made this step overdraft-risky and it MUST be re-sequenced, never silently left to drift (FR-PAY-003).

deferral_recommendations.description: Populated iff feasibility = infeasible: obligations ranked by criticality with a recommended defer/renegotiate action (the renegotiation itself is handed to Bills; Pay only recommends).

rationale_fr.description: A missing fr rationale when an en rationale exists is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

reasoning.description: Why this ordering: cites the no-overdraft constraint satisfied and the goal progress achieved, with bilingual rationale (SC-P-003).

freshness.description: Freshness of the runway/budget/inflow inputs the sequence was computed on. A stale primary money input WITHHOLDS the sequence rather than emitting one on stale data (Constitution IV/VI/VIII).
